name: SWITCHBOARD
tagline: Network lab automation cutting provisioning from days to minutes

starry.situation: A security QA and engineering department needed to stand up, modify, and tear down complex network configurations for global rollout — but manual reconfiguration was slow, error-prone, and blocked release velocity.
starry.task: Design and create SWITCHBOARD, a system to dynamically build and rebuild network configurations for test environments — safe, fast, and repeatable.
starry.action: Architected a configuration-as-code framework for network lab environments. Built templated provisioning workflows that could spin up, modify, and tear down full network topologies on demand. Integrated with the QA release pipeline to trigger lab builds automatically.
starry.result: Provisioning time reduced by 98%, from multiple weeks to hours. Configuration errors in pre-production eliminated. Release velocity increased significantly.
starry.return: Faster release cycles with lower lab costs and higher engineer productivity. Reduced risk from configuration mistakes in pre-prod.
starry.yield: Turned networking into infrastructure as code for QA — enabling safe iteration and scale while improving product quality and speed.
